name: chr19_19q13_2_EML2_SD
description: 19q13.2 SD field surrounding EML2 (echinoderm microtubule-associated protein-like 2) and BCKDHA. Sits between the CYP4F cluster and the very large 19q13.31/q13.33 ZNF blocks; contains intermediate-density intra-chromosomal SDs and is a recombination hotspot.

architecture.internal_structure: Several 10-50 kb SD duplicons at 95-99% identity flanking EML2, BCKDHA, GIPR; partial inter-chromosomal SDs to chr10/chr17.
